scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/ui typecheck && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/ui-lab typecheck && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/dashboard typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm typecheck && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/database test && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/reverse-proxy test && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/upgrade-availability test && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/village-export test && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/notification-policy test && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/collector test && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/notifier test && pnpm build && pnpm build:ui
scripts.lint: biome lint && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/dashboard lint && pnpm --filter @multi-coc/ui-lab lint
